news-korea-econ.description: Nelly Korda wins her first U.S. Women's Open at Riviera, taking a massive step toward becoming the face of American women's golf for decades to come.

news-global-econ.description: The British government has announced plans to mandate tech giants like Apple and Google to implement age verification measures to prevent children from accessing pornography. Critics warn that the demands will result in the imposition of effective digital IDs…

news-global-econ.title: Stunningly low percentage of adults in US think America stands above every other nation: poll
news-global-econ.description: As America marks its 250th anniversary this year, an AP-NORC poll of adults in the U.S. found that only 25% believed that the U.S. stands above every other nation.

news-global-econ.title: Worker Confidence Rises as Americans’ Inflation Expectations Fall, NY Fed Survey Shows
news-global-econ.description:
The perceived chance of voluntarily leaving a job in the next 12 months jumped 2.6 percentage points to 20.8 percent, the highest reading since February 2023.

news-global-econ.title: Scathing House Judiciary Committee report accuses NFL of stretching law's limited antitrust exemption
news-global-econ.description: House Judiciary Committee report accuses NFL of stretching its 1961 antitrust exemption, limiting consumer choices, and inflating Sunday Ticket prices.

news-global-soc.title: 'You're destroying your countries': Is Europe finally heeding Trump's warning on illegal immigration?
news-global-soc.description: Trump and Vance warned EU about illegal immigration as new stricter border rules emerge as Europe's politicians seem to be reacting to the needs of its citizens.

news-global-soc.title: VA Gov. Spanberger Signs Ban on Being Armed for Self-Defense in Hospitals
news-global-soc.description:
Gov. Abigail Spanberger (D) signed legislation Thursday prohibiting law-abiding Virginians from being armed for self-defense in hospitals.
